import_from_splitwise_details.follow_to_export_splitwise_data: Follow this link to export splitwise data
import_from_splitwise_details.note: Note: It currently only supports importing friends and groups. It will not import transactions. We are working on it.

select_user_or_group.only_one_group_time: You can have only one group at a time

user_input.add_more_friends: Search friends, groups or add email
user_input.search_friends: Search friends, groups or add email

balance_list.press_balance_info: Press on individual balance to initiate settlement

delete_expense_details.text: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your expense.
delete_expense_details.title: Are you absolutely sure?

multiple_transactions.title: Add multiple transactions
multiple_transactions.description: You have selected multiple transactions. Pick whether you want them added all together with the current split settings or adjust the settings one by one.

archive_group_details.can_archive: This group will be archived and hidden from your main groups list. You can still access it later if needed.
archive_group_details.cant_archive: Cannot archive group with outstanding balances. All balances must be settled first.
archive_group_details.title: Are you sure you want to archive this group?

delete_group_details.cant_delete: Can't delete the group until everyone settles up the balance
delete_group_details.title: Are you absolutely sure?

leave_group_details.cant_leave: Can't leave the group until your outstanding balance is settled
leave_group_details.title: Are you absolutely sure?

recalculate_balances_details.description: If balances do not match expenses, you can recalculate them. Note that it may take some time if the expense count is large. Balances outside the group will not be affected.
recalculate_balances_details.title: Are you sure?

remove_member_details.can_remove: You are about to remove this member from the group
remove_member_details.cant_remove: Can't remove member until their outstanding balance is settled
remove_member_details.title: Are you absolutely sure?

group_info.title: Group info
group_info.weight_hint: Weights determine how expenses are split. Higher weight = larger share.

no_members.no_members: No members in the group yet.

invite_message.text: Join to the group and you can add, manage expenses, and track your balances

meta.description: Split Expenses with your friends for free
meta.title: SplitPro: Split Expenses with your friends for free

recurrence.title: Recurrence
recurrence.description: Set up automatic recurrence for this expense.
recurrence.delete_description: This will stop future expense creation. Existing expenses created by this recurrence will not be deleted.
recurrence.edit_description: This will change the schedule for future expenses. Existing expenses will not be modified.
recurrence.template_edit_warning: This is a recurring expense template. Changes will apply to all future recurring expenses.
recurrence.derived_edit_warning: This expense is part of a recurrence. Changes will only affect this expense.
recurrence.template_delete_warning: This is a recurring expense template. Deleting it will stop all future recurring expenses.
recurrence.derived_delete_warning: This expense is part of a recurrence. Only this expense will be deleted. Future recurring expenses will continue.

ui.share_text: Check out SplitPro. It's an open source free alternative for Splitwise

errors.empty_file: The file appears to be empty
errors.no_rows_selected: No rows selected — tick at least one row to import.

upload.title: Upload CSV file
upload.description: Select a group and upload a CSV file with your expenses.

mapping.title: Map columns
mapping.description: Match CSV columns to expense fields. Amount is required.

payers.title: Map payers
payers.description: Match payer names from the CSV to group members.

defaults.title: Default values
defaults.description: Set defaults for fields that are missing in the CSV.
defaults.default_amount_hint: Used when a row has no amount. Rows with a zero amount are skipped.
defaults.split_type_drop: Skip rows without explicit split info
defaults.currency_note: Expenses will use the group currency: {{currency}}

preview.title: Review & import
preview.no_expenses: No valid expenses found in the CSV file.
preview.mismatch_warning: {{count}} selected row(s) have a mismatch between the amount and split amounts — please double-check before importing.

edit.locked_hint: Per-member amounts are preserved from the CSV and can't be edited here.
